tasks.title: Add helper method for parsing dates in planner
tasks.description: Create a unified utility function within src/lib/planner-derivations.ts to parse date inputs safely. This function should accept a string or Date, handle invalid formats, and return a clean ISO-8601 substring format (YYYY-MM-DD).

tasks.title: Add test coverage for parsed date parser utility
tasks.description: Add comprehensive unit tests in src/lib/__tests__/planner-derivations.test.ts to verify the date parsing utility handles typical dates, edge cases, empty values, and invalid formats correctly.

tasks.title: Dry-run: annotate planner derivations README
tasks.description: Supervised dry-run task to update agents/dev-agent/README.md with notes about supervised runs and safety. This task is for testing the interactive provider in DRY_RUN mode.

tasks.title: Add Planner component UI
tasks.description: Implement the Planner React component to display upcoming items, with responsive layout and basic interactions.

tasks.title: Add Planner unit tests
tasks.description: Add unit tests for Planner component and `parsePlannerDate` integration tests using Vitest and React Testing Library.

tasks.title: Improve header and navigation
tasks.description: Make the site header responsive, add accessible navigation links and mobile hamburger menu behavior.

tasks.title: Add E2E smoke test
tasks.description: Add a simple Playwright or Cypress smoke test that loads the index page and checks core UI elements are present.

tasks.title: Create Dashboard layout
tasks.description: Implement the main Dashboard page layout with grid sections for stats and recent activity.

tasks.title: Implement Activity feed component
tasks.description: Add ActivityFeed component to display recent events with pagination support.

tasks.title: Add settings page
tasks.description: Create a Settings page allowing users to toggle preferences and save to local storage.

tasks.title: Responsive card UI
tasks.description: Build a reusable Card component with responsive behavior and tests.

tasks.title: Add search input with debounce
tasks.description: Implement a SearchBar component with debounce and keyboard accessibility.

tasks.title: Optimize image loading
tasks.description: Add responsive image components and lazy loading for key assets to improve performance.

tasks.title: Implement notification toast
tasks.description: Add a toast notification system used across the app with unit tests.

tasks.title: Add form validation helpers
tasks.description: Create reusable form validation utilities and integrate with SettingsForm.

tasks.title: Implement dark mode
tasks.description: Add dark mode toggle and CSS variables theme support across the site.

tasks.title: Add accessibility audit fixes
tasks.description: Run axe/core checks and fix top accessibility issues (aria labels, color contrast).

tasks.title: Improve header performance
tasks.description: Refactor Header to reduce re-renders and improve bundle size (memoization, code-splitting).

tasks.title: Add localization support
tasks.description: Introduce i18n scaffold, add English strings and infrastructure for translations.

tasks.title: Add skeleton loaders
tasks.description: Add skeleton loading states for Dashboard and Planner while fetching data.

tasks.title: Implement pagination API client
tasks.description: Add a lightweight client utility to request paginated endpoints and handle cursors.

tasks.title: Add analytics event hooks
tasks.description: Add an analytics hook and fire key UI events (page view, button click) for telemetry.

tasks.title: Create contribution guide
tasks.description: Add CONTRIBUTING.md focused on frontend development, testing, and committing conventions.
